negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_008
prompt: The video opens with an aerial view of a vast, textured landscape dominated by large, undulating mounds of coal or a similar granular material. The terrain is marked by deep grooves and ridges, creating a patterned surface that stretches across the frame, caused by the movement of the bucket wheel excavator. A prominent piece of heavy machinery, likely a bucket wheel excavator, is situated amidst these mounds. The machine has a cylindrical body and is connected to a long, horizontal structure extending into the distance, indicating it is part of an industrial operation. The scene remains static throughout the video, with no visible movement or changes in the position of the machinery or the terrain. The lighting suggests a clear day, casting distinct shadows that accentuate the texture and depth of the landscape. By the final frame, the scene continues to depict the same tranquil, unchanging industrial setting, with no new objects or actions occurring.
